Choose to woo either Princess Astrid (give flowers, dance emote, later a bow, then blow-kiss emote, then a ring) or Prince Brand (give flowers, clap/cheer emote, a cake, then blow-kiss emote, then a ring) through several rounds of agreeable dialogue until they call you 'dear'. Ferry an anthem and treaty back and forth between the two royal siblings (advisor Ghrim fixes a bad anthem), forge a giant pen from an iron bar via blacksmith Derrik, then grind favour from 25% to 75% by buying flowers / raking herbs+flax outside the castle / mining coal / chopping maples / fishing near the docks (world-hopping regrows weeds faster) before reporting back to Vargas.

name: Tower of Life

items: 1 regular beer (other beer types do not work)

unlocks: Access to Creature Creation minigame
Builder's costume

notes: Novice puzzle quest, only 10 Construction required. Climb the tower fixing 3 broken machines with scavenged parts: a pressure/valve-and-lever pipe puzzle, a simpler pipe-fitting puzzle, and a cage-building puzzle where each of 4 sides needs specific horizontal/vertical piece sizes placed in order. Afterward, answer the Homunculus's back-and-forth dialogue quiz picking consistently either all 'Logic' or all 'Magic' answers to finish the questline and unlock the Creature Creation minigame. A raw chicken + raw swordfish let you optionally kill a 'swordchick' afterward for a Medium Ardougne diary task.

name: Tribal Totem
notes: Only requirement is 21 Thieving (boostable); no items needed. Track a totem stolen from the Rantuki tribe through a shipping company's Ardougne depot: relabel a crate to redirect it, get teleported by Wizard Cromperty into collector Lord Handelmort's hideout, crack a spoken door password ('KURT' -- type slowly or it fails), thieve open a locked staircase (needs 21 Thieving) and search a chest for the totem, then return it to Kangai Mau in Brimhaven.

name: Troll Romance

items: Climbing boots (skippable if using Trollheim Teleport)
Wax (swamp tar used on a bucket of wax, made ahead with a cake tin)
reqs.other: Must be able to defeat a level 113 troll (Arrg).

unlocks: 1 uncut diamond, 2 uncut rubies, 4 uncut emeralds
A sled (needed for a hard and two elite clue-scroll steps)
A sledding shortcut route down Trollweiss Mountain
Arrg added to Nightmare Zone

notes: Needs Troll Stronghold + Death Plateau + 28 Agility (boostable), plus the ability to beat level 113 Arrg. Play matchmaker for the troll Ug: build a sled with blacksmith Dunstan in Burthorpe out of an iron bar and wax (swamp tar + bucket of wax), sled down a mountain course north-west of Trollheim while dodging ice trolls, stop mid-run to collect rare Trollweiss flowers, then return to Ug and fight Arrg -- he opens with an immediate melee+ranged combo hitting in the 30s and can despawn if not killed fast enough, so gear up before talking to him.

name: Wanted!

items: 10,000 coins OR (1 law rune + enchanted gem + molten glass) to make a Commorb
20 unnoted rune essence or pure essence, same type, delivered all at once
A light source (candles/torches/oil lamps can trigger swamp gas explosions off-route -- carry a tinderbox)
reqs.other: Must be able to defeat a level 32 Black Knight.

unlocks: Access to the White Knights' armoury (White equipment)

notes: First Temple Knight recruitment quest; needs 32 quest points plus Recruitment Drive (itself needing Black Knights' Fortress + Druidic Ritual), The Lost Tribe (needing Rune Mysteries + Goblin Diplomacy), Priest in Peril, and Enter the Abyss. Get a Commorb device from Tiffy/Sir Amik, meet informant Lord Daquarius in the Black Knights' Base inside Taverley Dungeon after killing a Black Knight, hand 20 essence to the Mage of Zamorak at the Chaos Altar, then use the Commorb to 'scan' and chase fugitive Solus Dellagar across roughly 7 wiki-listed locations in sequence (Rellekka, Musa Point, Wizards' Tower, Dorgesh-Kaan, Ardougne, Champions' Guild, etc. -- exact set/order varies) -- this leg alone can take 20-30+ minutes with no way to skip Savant's cutscene dialogue. Finish with an instanced kill of Solus in the rune essence mine.

name: What Lies Below

items: Access to the Chaos Altar (chaos + catalytic talismans/tiaras, or Abyss, or Temple of the Eye)

unlocks: The Beacon ring
Shortcut to the Chaos Altar
King Roald added to Nightmare Zone
5 Kudos (need Dagon'hai history book, claim from Historian Minas)
5 Battlestaves stocked at Zaff's Superior Staffs (as soon as King Roald is defeated, quest need not be finished)

notes: Needs Rune Mysteries + 35 Runecraft. Recover a stranded trader's documents stolen by outlaws west of the Grand Exchange, which pulls you into a Zamorak-monk conspiracy: infuse a wand at the Chaos Altar, deliver findings to Surok Magis in Varrock Palace's library, then fight an instanced King Roald -- bring him to 2hp or less and operate the Beacon ring (chatbox prompts when it's ready) to summon an ally and finish him off. Grab the Dagon'hai history book from a nearby bookshelf before leaving to claim 5 bonus Kudos afterward.

name: A Kingdom Divided

unlocks: The book of the dead
Two antique lamps (10,000 xp each to any skill level 40+, only one if the Architectural Alliance lamp was already claimed before 10 Jan 2024)
Ability to set respawn point to Kourend Castle (via Asteros Arceuus)
24 new spells unlocked in the Arceuus spellbook (all combat spells except Ghostly Grasp/Inferior Demonbane, all utility spells except Resurrect Crops/reanimation spells)
Ability to fight the boss Yama

notes: Investigate the disgraced Councillor Sophia Hughes' escape for Commander Fullore and Martin Holt. Search a house for a receipt, question Tomas Lawry and the Lovakengj pub owner Fuggy, then a cutscene at Veos's boat in Port Piscarilius drops you straight into a fight with the level-168 demon Judge of Yama (dodge fire waves like Galvek, melee him in the gaps, he prays overhead the whole fight). Pickpocket Istoria and search a case in the Arceuus Library for Rose's diary and a hidden note, then chase Rose's trail: solve a stone-pile numeric code at the Forthos Ruins, fight off an assassin and melt an ice panel with a fire spell at the Settlement Ruins, and match statue-panel order at The Legless Faun in Piscarilius, ending at a shack trapdoor near the Farming Guild. Head into Molch's Lizard dwelling to see Khat B'alam, retrieve a lizardman egg from Kebos Swamp (a level-75 lizardman brute attacks but doesn't need to be killed) to trade for a key, then fight the spirit boss Xamphur (239, Protect from Magic, kill summoned hands, dodge falling-hand mechanic Vorkath-style). Visit all five Kourend house Lords/Ladies at their home locations, then again at Xeric's Lookout to gather their support. Finish by brewing a sulphur potion (defence potion + volcanic sulphur) enchanted by Kaal-Mej-San at Mount Karuulm into a shielding potion for the Doors of Dinh, defeat a level-91 Barbarian Warlord in the Kourend Woodland, collect a declaration from Jorra in the Graveyard of Heroes (kill a level-132 assassin), craft a dark essence block (pickaxe+chisel a dense runestone near the Dark Altar, use on the Dark Altar) to trade Mori for a dark nullifier, retrieve a Shayzien journal from a lockpicked chest in the Hosidius Vinery, then report back to all five Lords and Commander Fullore at Xeric's Lookout for the final cutscenes.

name: A Night at the Theatre

unlocks: Four antique lamps, 20,000 xp each in Attack/Strength/Defence/Ranged/Magic/Hitpoints (level 50+; only two lamps if the quest was completed before 28 July 2021 and the original two were already used)

refs.title: A Night at the Theatre/Quick guide

notes: The Mysterious Stranger wants Lady Verzik Vitur humiliated. Kill a vyrewatch below the Theatre for a key, unlock a gate and loot a coffin for Ranis' head, then head to a cave north of Darkmeyer to find an egg sac guarded by venomous spiders (bring anti-venom/antipoison) — get sulphuric acid from Daer Krand in the Sisterhood Sanctuary (south of Slepe graveyard) and pour it on the egg sac for strange spider eggs (no need to kill the spiders). With a ghostspeak amulet or Morytania legs 2+, visit the Nature Spirit at the Nature Grotto (fairy ring BIP), then cross to the island east of Mort Myre Swamp (north of the Shades of Mort'ton entrance) to kill the level-302 hespori and chop it for hespori bark. Deliver both trophies to the Mysterious Stranger, then complete one Theatre of Blood raid (any mode; entry mode recommended, skippable if you already have a completion) and report back to finish.

name: A Soul's Bane

unlocks: 500 coins
Access to Tolna's rift for combat training

notes: Requires the ability to defeat level 45+ enemies (no formal skill/quest gate). Instanced combat gauntlet down a rift near the Digsite: fill a rage bar killing angry unicorns/bears/rats/goblins with themed weapons in room 1, hunt 5-6 fear reapers hiding in holes in room 2, tell 6 confusion beasts apart from their fakes (fakes vanish after 8 hits, give free combat xp) in room 3, kill hopeless creatures 3 times each in room 4, then defeat all 3 heads of Tolna to finish. Progress resets on logout mid-room; re-entering the rift post-quest also completes a Varrock Medium diary task.

Get Hild to enchant a catspeak amulet with 5 death runes, then use it to Locate Bob repeatedly across a list of world-hoppable spawn spots (western Varrock anvil and Draynor Manor garden are the fastest camp spots). Visit Gertrude and Reldo in Varrock Palace library to learn Bob's lineage, then travel to Sophanem to consult the Sphinx (desert-region travel, needs desert clothing or waterskins). Do a set of fetch-quest chores for Unferth at his house (grow potatoes, make the bed, light the fireplace, feed him cake+milk, cut his hair with shears) before a final disguise-and-cutscene sequence with the Apothecary in Varrock to cure Bob's "sickness" (white doctor/nurse outfit required).

Notably hard boss relative to the quest's skill reqs -- 60+ melee and 43+ Prayer recommended despite low stated requirements.

Return to the same Barbarian Guard at the Outpost gate to finish. No combat, no items needed beyond travel means.

Ability to trade Ava for her devices
Ballistic attractor schematic if Pandemonium completed

notes: 4-stage fetch quest for Ava's device. Stage 1: talk to Ava, travel to undead chicken farm west of Ectofuntus, talk Alice/Malcolm loop, get crone-made amulet from old crone near Slayer Tower, give to Malcolm, buy 2 undead chickens w/ ecto-tokens. Stage 2: bring chickens + iron bars + hammer to Ava, get selected iron from Witch in manor, forge at Rimmington mine (face north), return magnet to Ava. Stage 3: cut undead tree (not dead tree) outside manor w/ mithril axe, see Turael in Burthorpe for Blessed axe (needs mithril axe + holy symbol), cut undead tree again for twigs, give to Ava, solve orb puzzle (toggle off all but 2nd/5th/9th left-to-right), combine solved notes + button + leather, hand in. Core reward is the Ava's device line feeding Ranged training.

Ability to buy Goblin Village teleport spheres
Free access to the Dorgesh-Kaan-Keldagrim train system

notes: Archaeology-themed goblin quest: dig up 6 artefacts in a cave south of Dorgesh-Kaan's middle level and clean them on a specimen table for Tegdak, which uncovers another H.A.M. plot. Teleport to the Goblin Village with Zanik following, then fight through an ambush killing a level-30 H.A.M. Mage and level-30 H.A.M. Archer with Ranged/Magic only (a spare crossbow+bolts spawns nearby if unequipped). Sneak past goblin guards in the Lumbridge Swamp Caves via a scripted stealth sequence with a goblin-sergeant escort, then fight Sigmund (level 64) at the end -- save the ancient mace's special attack until after he activates Protect from Melee/prayer, since the special disables his prayer for the rest of the fight. Untie Zanik to finish; optionally ride the train to Keldagrim afterward for a Lumbridge & Draynor Diary hard task.

skills: Mining 42 (only if doing the Lovakengj volcanic-sulphur favour activity)

notes: REMOVED FROM THE GAME on 10 January 2024 (Children of the Sun update), alongside the entire Kourend Favour system -- this miniquest can no longer be started or completed by any account, live or otherwise; the page documents legacy content only. When it existed: task was to reach 100% favour in all 5 Great Kourend houses (Arceuus/Hosidius/Lovakengj/Piscarilius/Shayzien) via each house's favour activities (library assistance, ploughing/fertiliser, sulphur mining, fishing-crane repair/sandworm hunting, infirmary/crime-fighting), each of which also had its own house-specific sub-quest that granted a favour bump. Given the removal, do not schedule this as live-game work; retained here only because the depth:04 bundle explicitly named it.

name: At First Light

notes: Speak to Guildmaster Apatura and Guild Scribe Verity in the tree-basement of the Hunters' Guild, then get a toy mouse from Guild Hunter Wolf and use it to distract Guild Hunter Kiko so you can check his cat bed. Go help injured Guild Hunter Fox south-east of the guild near the mine: pick a leaf from a leafy bush near him, pick a second leaf at Locus Oasis, and catch 2 embertailed jerboas with a box trap for their tails, then combine a tail with the leaves into a makeshift poultice and give it to Fox. Visit Atza near the southern gate of Civitas illa Fortis, set up a pile of equipment (hammer available nearby) for her, and receive trimmed fur in return. Return the trimmed fur/report to Fox, deliver his report to Guild Scribe Verity, fix Kiko's cat bed with the spare jerboa tail, and report to Guildmaster Apatura to finish. No combat required.

notes: Six independent skill lessons taught by Otto Godblessed, doable in any order, each ending by reporting success back to him: (1) heavy-rod fishing - search the barbarian bed for a rod, catch a leaping fish, dissect it for roe; (2) barehanded fishing - catch at any harpoon spot with no tool; (3) firemaking with a bow - use logs on the bow per a level table, then (advanced) kill mithril dragons for chewed bones and build/light a funeral pyre ship; (4) farming - bare-hand-plant a seed, then plant a sapling by smashing its pot; (5) smithing - forge one bronze spear then one bronze hasta at the barbarian anvil, asking Otto between each; (6) herblore - use roe on a 2-dose attack potion to brew a barbarian potion. Unlocks are used throughout later Barbarian-series content (Scorpion Catcher, Horror from the Deep, Rag and Bone Man II bank access via mithril-dragon farming).

Lost soul bearers are freely re-obtainable by digging the crypt again.

Access to the Ruins of Camdozaal

Recruit Checkal in Barbarian Village: train with Atlas in The Long Hall tavern, then use the Flex emote on him with cooked meat/beer from the tavern tables in hand. Recruit Marley at the yew trees in Edgeville (must speak to him first), then get the steak sandwich recipe from the cook at Varrock's Blue Moon Inn and craft one (knife on cooked meat with bread in inventory) to bring back to Marley. Recruit Burntof at Falador's Rising Sun Inn by buying him a beer and winning/playing a round of rock-paper-scissors. With all three recruited, meet Willow at the Ruins of Camdozaal entrance west of Ice Mountain; after the entry cutscene, defeat the level-25 Ancient Guardian (fight it directly, or mine its 4 corner structural pillars instead of combat) to finish.

name: Beneath Cursed Sands

unlocks: Access to the Tombs of Amascut raid

Fairy ring code AKP on a small island south-west of the necropolis
Jaltevas teleport option on the Pharaoh's sceptre (via Commune on the necropolis obelisk)

notes: Investigate Menaphos's lockdown for the Al Kharid spy Maisa at her campsite east of Sophanem (reachable after quest-start via fairy ring AKP or a Communed Pharaoh's sceptre). Defeat the level-174 Head Menaphite Guard at the blocked Jaltevas Pyramid entrance without Protect from Melee (it deals 1/3 max HP through the prayer). At the Ruins of Ullek, light a furnace with coal, dig up a passcode-locked chest (1118513), craft and place a scarab emblem on a pillar (facing pincers-up), then fight through two level-119 Scarab Mages and disable timed lever traps in a corridor maze. Solve the Riddle of the Tomb by matching per-player emblem clues (item/god order) to the correct urns, then grab a rusty key from the spirit's room. Use ranged to fight the level-379 Champion of Scabaras (alternates magic/melee — stay at range, destroy its 20hp Shadow Rift fast, kill its poison-swarm summon quickly, avoid its 4-tile Shadow Burst). At Nardah, feed a crocodile at the River Elid to retrieve a Lily of the Elid, then help Zahur balance her chemistry-heat puzzle (max the middle/right bars, halve the right, lower the middle to finish) for a pox cure to deliver to the High Priest in Sophanem. Finally return to the necropolis and defeat the level-351 Menaphite Akh (melee; dodge her lightning-bolt twitch attack by standing behind/beside her; kill her summoned Menaphite Shadow quickly or it can swap places with her) to complete the quest.

name: Between a Rock...

items: Ammo mould (buyable in-quest, 5 coins) or double ammo mould

notes: Direct sequel to Dwarf Cannon. Cross the river to Dondakan via the Dwarven Ferryman, then collect 3 Dwarven lore book pages in the Dwarven Mine (kill scorpions, search mine carts, mine any non-Adamantite/Coal rock). Make a golden cannonball (gold bar smelted at a furnace) and fire it at Dondakan's rock to get a Schematic; combine it with base schematics from the lore book and further schematics from the Dwarf Engineer, then smith a gold helmet. Final battle: equip the gold helmet + best pickaxe, mine 6 or 15 gold ore inside the arena (15 lowers the boss from level 125 to 75), then fight one of three Arzinian Avatar variants (chosen by your highest combat stat) within an 8-minute time limit -- removing the helmet mid-fight aborts the attempt. Talk to Dondakan again to finish.

notes: Intermediate quest requiring the ability to defend against level 64 wolves and level 53 ogres. Talk to Rantz the ogre; chop achey trees south-west of him, knife the logs into ogre arrow shafts, feather them, chisel 4 wolf bones (dropped by nearby wolves) into arrowtips and attach them, then hand the finished ogre arrows to Rantz. Ask him all his dialogue options, enter the cave north of him, talk to Fycie and Bugs and unlock their chest for ogre bellows; fill the bellows from swamp bubbles south-west and use them on a swamp toad for bloated toads (can hold up to 3). Drop a bloated toad where Rantz points, wait for a chompy bird, then take the ogre bow from him and kill the chompy bird yourself; pluck it for raw chompy meat. Return to the cave, gather the ingredients Fycie/Bugs ask for, cook the chompy on the spit-roast north of Rantz, and hand it in to finish. Required for: Mourning's End Part I, Recipe for Disaster (Lumbridge Guide & Skrach Uglogwee), Zogre Flesh Eaters, Western Provinces Diary.

Return to Veos, then travel near the Dark Altar (Games necklace to Wintertodt Camp then run, or fairy ring code CIS) and activate the mysterious orb. Return to Veos to finish.

name: Clock Tower

items: Bucket of water (or Ice gloves / Jug of water / Smith's gloves (i))

unlocks: 500 coins

notes: No skill/quest gate; the wiki's own 'requirements' line is just 'ability to run past level 53 Ogres' -- not a level check, a survivability note for the red-cog room. Find 4 coloured cogs in the dungeon under the tower and fit each into its matching spindle one at a time (can't carry more than one cog at once): blue cog sits in a rat cell; black cog needs a bucket of water or ice gloves to cool it before picking up; red cog is guarded by ogres; white cog requires poisoning dungeon rats (rat poison + food trough) to unhinge a gate. Reward is a flat 500 coins, no xp. Fills out the Ardougne-diary prereq set alongside Plague City and Sheep Shearer.

name: Cold War

skills: Crafting 30 (boostable: no to start; unboosted 30 needed to craft the drums)

Raw cod or ring of charos (a)

notes: Only quest in the Penguin series. Zookeeper Larry is paranoid about penguins; build a bird-hide lookout on the Iceberg (oak plank + spade on a snow patch) and watch a cutscene of a unique-per-player 3-emote penguin greeting sequence (memorize it -- 8 possible emotes, needed later). Craft a Clockwork suit at a crafting table 3 (plank + silk + clockwork mechanism). Test it on zoo penguins using the memorized emote greeting (guessable if forgotten, max 24 tries) to learn they're planning to escape by flying; find more penguins disguised as sheep in Fred the Farmer's Lumbridge pasture, get a secret phrase ("do not trust the walrus") by trading a raw cod or wearing a ring of charos. Gather swamp tar + 5 feathers to trade black-marketeer Noodle for a fake KGP ID, then infiltrate the Iceberg outpost with the password "cabbage", complete the Penguin Agility Course, and steal a cowbell + craft Penguin Bongos (mahogany plank + leather) to distract the guards Ping and Pong and open the war room. Get caught by Pescaling Pax and thrown in an Icelord cage (level 51, kill 1-3, each grants 40 Attack xp) to escape, then report the penguin invasion plan back to Larry.

name: Contact!

items: Light source (Kandarin headgear/Firemaking cape/Abyssal lantern/bruma torch recommended so traps can't extinguish it; else buy an unlit torch for 200gp)
Tinderbox (unless using a non-extinguishable light source; else buy for 50gp)

unlocks: Keris dagger
Access to Sophanem shops (bank, Blades by Urbi, Nathifa's Bake Stall, The Spice Is Right)
Music tracks Back to Life and The Spymaster

notes: Sequel to Icthlarin's Little Helper: sneak into Menaphos through the Sophanem dungeon labyrinth. Talk to the High Priest, then Jex in Sophanem's NE building, descend and follow the tile-marker path (green=direction, yellow=step carefully, red=warning) through floor/wall traps, crusher blocks, sand pits and scarab pit-traps to a ladder -- keep Protect from Magic up and auto-retaliate off; one scarab trap drops you a level into multi-combat. Search Kaleef's corpse, read the parchment, then shuttle between Maisa (west) and Osman (Al Kharid, then Sophanem's gates) to arrange a second, secret entrance. Re-enter via that route and kill the level-191 Giant Scarab boss (safespottable near Kaleef's body with Protect from Missiles if maging/ranging, but it can spawn mages/riders and extinguishes bullseye lanterns -- bring a tinderbox). Talk to Osman, optionally grab Keris for the Desert hard diary (don't teleport out if going for that task; return and kill a locust rider with it), then return to the High Priest to finish. Gates Beneath Cursed Sands and continues the desert quest series toward Desert Treasure II.

name: Cook's Assistant

unlocks: Permission to use the Cook-o-matic 100 (reduces burn chance on some foods)

notes: Novice tutorial-tier quest, all 3 ingredients are free and gettable during the quest with zero GE use. Talk to the Cook about the Duke's birthday cake; get a bucket from the castle cellar and use it on a dairy cow in the Lumbridge cow field for milk; get an egg from the chicken farm north-west of the cow field; get an empty pot from the Cook, pick grain outside the Mill Lane Mill, climb to the top floor and use the grain on the hopper, pull the lever, then scoop flour from the bin downstairs with the pot. Hand all 3 items to the Cook to finish. Required for: Recipe for Disaster; also an Easy Lumbridge & Draynor Diary task (bake bread on the Lumbridge castle kitchen range).

name: Creature of Fenkenstrain

items: 50 coins or 1 law + 1 air rune (for Telekinetic Grab)
ability to defeat a level 51 Experiment and run past level 72 monsters

required for Garden of Tranquillity
required for The Great Brain Robbery

notes: Help Dr Fenkenstrain build a monster: read two books for a memorial-opening amulet, dig up a head in the vampyre-infested Haunted Woods, kill an Experiment in the Experiment Cave for body parts, sew the parts together, get a shed key from the Gardener Ghost, extend a garden brush for a conductor mould, smelt a silver bar into a conductor at a furnace, repair the castle's lightning conductor to power the monster, then pickpocket Fenkenstrain for the ring of charos once the monster is animated.

name: Current Affairs

unlocks: Access to Sea charting/Current
current duck tool
mayor of Catherby (placeable in POH)
25 sawmill coupon (oak plank)

notes: Third Sailing-skill quest. Arhein wants to test whether a duck can track ocean currents but is blocked by Catherby bureaucracy. Fill in form cr-4p for Councillor Catherine using charcoal (answers are arbitrary but must be repeated later -- picking the first option every time is simplest). She reveals the by-law needs mayoral approval, and the current mayor died -- Catherby has had 25 consecutive fish mayors. Buy a mayoral fishbowl and tiny net from Harry (50 coins) and fish a new Mayor of Catherby from an aquarium, then get it a mayoral chain from Arhein. Redo the form quiz for Catherine (only wrong answers need repeating), sign form 7r4-5h with the new mayor, and return it to change the by-law. Take a boat out east near the Obelisk of Water, find a ripple, and use the current duck on it to track the current to shore near Holgart, then return the duck to Arhein to finish. Needs a boat docked at Catherby for the final leg.

name: Curse of the Empty Lord

skills: Thieving 53 (not boostable) to obtain the Ring of visibility
Prayer 31 (not boostable) only needed if your randomized sequence routes you through the Edgeville Monastery 2nd floor

Multiple stops are deep/dangerous Wilderness (up to level 56, e.g. Rogues' Castle in Seq1, Edgeville Dungeon in Seq3). Robes are individually reclaimable for free afterward by revisiting your sequence's ghosts.

name: Daddy's Home

items: 10 planks (regular only -- oak/teak/mahogany will NOT work)
5 bolts of cloth (buyable at the Sawmill, 650gp each)
At least 16 nails of any type (100 recommended -- nails can bend while building, more obtainable from the Sawmill during the quest)

Marlo's crate: 25 planks, 50 mithril nails, 5 steel bars, 10 oak planks, 8 bolts of cloth, 5 house teleports, 1 Falador teleport

notes: 944 Construction xp splits as 400 flat quest reward + 544 earned in-quest from actually building the 6 furniture pieces (carpet, 2 stools, 2 tables, chair, waxwood bed). The bed needs 3 waxwood planks specifically: search kitchen crates for 3 waxwood logs and take them to the Varrock sawmill operator, who mills them free for this quest. This is a straightforward first-Construction-unlock miniquest (Novice difficulty, no combat), primarily useful for its free POH grant.

name: Darkness of Hallowvale

notes: Myreque chain quest 3: cross into Meiyerditch via boat, meet Old Man Ral, run the sickle-logo agility maze to reach Vertida's hideout, then a fetch-quest loop back to Burgh de Rott and Paterdomus/Varrock before returning to sneak into the castle walls under Vanstrom Klause's nose (he attacks you 5x during the sketch cutscenes -- pray melee to no-damage it), then grab the alchemy tome from the secret lab with Telekinetic Grab. No combat kills required, just surviving Vanstrom's scripted hits.

name: Death on the Isle

unlocks: Costume needle (from the Costumer)
Butler's tray + assortment of masks (from the Head Butler)
North Aldarin teleport destination via pendant of ates

notes: Murder-mystery on the island of Aldarin. Break into the house north of Patzi via the south window (wait for the guard to move) to steal a servant uniform, then wear it to enter Villa Lucens through the Head Butler (who holds your gear). Talk to the four nobles (Constantinius, Cozyac, Pavo, Xocotla) and Patzi, then search the wine cellar for clues (antique wine, injured man, jugs, box, stool, pottery, Livius' body, wine storage). Talk to guards Stradius/Hutza, pickpocket all six suspects, inspect the physical evidence (wine labels, threatening note, shipping contract, drinking flask), then accuse and fight Adala (level 49) -- she's innocent. Climb the Loose rocks shortcut, go backstage, question the Costumer, search the poisoned crate/secret bookshelf passage/stained costume rack, then accuse and fight Naiatli on stage to close the case. Post-quest: claim masks/tray from the Head Butler, needle from the Costumer, pickpocket Constantinius for a chest key (opens the cellar's fancy chest), search the SW fountain for an icon, and use it on the NE Aldarin statue for a bonus reward.

name: Death Plateau

items: 60 coins (bring 1000 to skip the dice-gamble grind)

unlocks: Steel claws
Ability to make claws
Climbing boots purchasable from Tenzing

notes: Novice quest, opens the troll questline. Talk to Denulth about the troll raids on Burthorpe; ask Eohric on the 1st floor of the castle then Harold at the Burthorpe bar about the missing guard. Give Harold an Asgarnian ale (a Blurberry special auto-wins the dice bet, otherwise gamble over 60gp repeatedly until he goes bankrupt) for an IOU note with a combination; use the combination on the 5 coloured balls at the castle to unlock a door. Talk to Saba in the cave north-west of Burthorpe about another route up the plateau; talk to Tenzing, then Dunstan for a certificate, and exchange the certificate + climbing boots + iron bar for spiked boots. Give Tenzing 10 unnoted bread + 10 unnoted trout + the spiked boots for a map, walk the back route around the mountain (ignore the Death Plateau warning message on the main path), and talk to Denulth with the combination to finish. Required for: Troll Stronghold.

name: Death to the Dorgeshuun

items: 2 full sets of H.A.M. robes (7 pieces each - drop chance boosted during quest)
Pickaxe (unless using games necklace post-Tears of Guthix)

unlocks: H.A.M. Store room access (loot chests: gems/jewellery/coins)
Water wheel tunnel access (Lumbridge Castle cellar <-> Dorgeshuun Mines <-> water wheel, free travel)
Bone dagger + Dorgeshuun crossbow special attacks
Dorgesh-Kaan city access
A free torch if you had no light source

notes: Must beat level-50 Sigmund with melee or magic. Follow Kazgar through hole under Lumbridge kitchen to Mistag, bring 2 sets of H.A.M. robes to Zanik in Lumbridge cellar (ironmen: pickpocket H.A.M. members instead, better odds during quest). Zanik follows you on a Lumbridge town tour (talk to Cook/Duke/Hans/random Man-or-Woman/Bob/Father Aereck/Lumbridge Guide/a goblin/shopkeeper) then infiltrate the H.A.M. Hideout in disguise (full robes), talk Johanhus, find a hidden trapdoor, and use a multi-step guard-sniping stealth sequence: position Zanik out of guard sightlines, lure each guard into her line of fire one at a time (4 guards total) using wait/say-now dialogue commands. Get arrested by a senior guard, pick the cell lock to escape, find Zanik dead and take her body. Travel to Juna in the Chasm of Tears (via Tears of Guthix path from Lumbridge kitchen cellar - mine a blockage, hop a stone between waterfalls, or games-necklace teleport if that quest is done) and collect 20 tears to revive Zanik in a cutscene. Return to the castle cellar, go to the chicken farm near the water wheel, hide Zanik in an empty crate, descend a trapdoor in full H.A.M. robes to fight and kill 3 Senior Guards (safespottable via Zanik) then Sigmund (level 50, uses protect-missiles in phase 2, safespottable behind boxes). Smash the drilling machine and exit south. Directly extends the H.A.M. Hideout thieving spot with post-quest loot-chest access.

name: Defender of Varrock

items: Barronite deposit or a pickaxe to mine one

unlocks: Access to Zemouregal's Base
5 Kudos + 5,000xp lamp from Historian Minas

notes: Long-chain endgame Varrock quest gated behind six other quests plus 55 Smithing/52 Hunter. Talk to Elias in the Jolly Boar Inn, follow a forest trail of inspectable clues east to a trapdoor dungeon, kill armoured zombies and bottle their red mist (3 before meeting Arrav, 3 more after) to investigate the undead uprising. Report to Elias at Varrock Palace, then head to Ruins of Camdozaal, get a chaos core from Chaos Golems and combine it with a mined barronite deposit at the Sacred Forge to imbue a barronite ore. Finally receive the Shield of Arrav from Captain Rovin in Varrock Palace, dig through Reldo's scrolls/records to identify the Fitzharmon descendant among six named Varrock NPCs, then confront Dimintheis in south-east Varrock to trigger the finale cutscene.

name: Demon Slayer

5 Kudos, claimable from Historian Minas in Varrock Museum

notes: No skill/quest requirements; must be able to defeat a level 27 demon (Delrith) aided by dark wizards, using Silverlight in melee. Give Aris 1gp, then collect three keys to Silverlight from three Varrock Palace NPCs: Captain Rovin (talk, NW tower 2F), a rusty key found via bucket-of-water-on-drain then a manhole dungeon crawl, and Wizard Traiborn at the Wizards' Tower in exchange for 25 un-noted bones. Return the keys to Sir Prysin, wield Silverlight, fight through dark wizards at Varrock's south entrance, then banish Delrith with the incantation Aris/Wally gave earlier (randomized per player, re-askable from Aris if forgotten).

name: Desert Treasure I

items: 10+ Shantay passes or another way into the Kharidian Desert
spice (gnome spice/Evil Dave's spices do not count)
facemask, slayer helmet, or gas mask

Access to the Smoke Dungeon
Ability to obtain an ancient signet from Eblis
Dessous, Damis, Fareed, and Kamil fightable in the Nightmare Zone

notes: Master-tier quest, the classic 4-diamond fetch. Talk to Asgarnia Smith at Bedabin Camp, get a scroll translated by Terry Balando at the Digsite Exam Centre, buy Eblis a beer at the bandit-camp pub, deliver the listed items to Eblis to learn of the four diamonds, then collect them in any order: Smoke diamond (light 4 torches in the Smoke Dungeon before they burn out, unlock the central chest, kill Fareed -- ice gloves or water spells needed to damage him); Shadow diamond (pick 3 locks on a chest in the bandit camp, give the gilded cross to Rasolo for the ring of visibility, then kill Damis in both forms underground -- safespottable, drains prayer fast); Ice diamond (feed a Troll child a sweet, kill 5 ice trolls then Kamil using only fire spells, wear spiked boots to climb an ice ledge, melt 3 frozen trolls with a fire spell); Blood diamond (get a silver pot blessed on Entrana, mix spice+garlic powder into a pot of blood from Malak in Canifis, pour it on Dessous's tomb in the Morytania Graveyard and kill him -- alternating protect-melee/protect-range each tick avoids most damage). Place all 4 diamonds in the pyramid's obelisks, then race through 4 trapped floors to reach Azzanadra. Flattened per depth:02 convention: Troll Stronghold's own requirement Death Plateau is folded into reqs.quests directly. Required for: Recipe for Disaster (Culinaromancer), Curse of the Empty Lord miniquest (partial completion only), Hopespear's Will miniquest, The Frozen Door miniquest, Hard tiers of Desert/Varrock/Morytania diaries, Elite tiers of Ardougne/Wilderness/Lumbridge/Desert diaries, Desert Treasure II - The Fallen Empire.

refs.title: Desert Treasure II - The Fallen Empire
Desert Treasure II - The Fallen Empire/Quick guide

notes: Grandmaster capstone: the Ancient Vault hub has 4 empty statues, one per medallion looted from the 'Forgotten Four' bosses guarding fragments of the fallen Empty Lord's empire. Familiar Faces: solve a mural/mining intro at the Digsite then kill the Ancient Guardian (shield regens unless meleed; dodge falling rocks by avoiding shadowed tiles) and solve a totem/cell golem puzzle. Vardorvis: sail to the Stranglewood, defend Kasonde from strangled for 3 minutes with barricades/satchels, brew a strangler serum from gathered herbs, kill Vardorvis (slash weapon, dodge axes/root splats/prayer-disabling darts) then Kasonde himself (ranged/kite, avoid poison splats, out-DPS his healing). Perseriya: through Guardians of the Rift's Scar, solve 3 randomized puzzle rooms (nerve-combination circuits, cerebral-orb maze, rune-nerve crafting) to burn 3 ships, then fight the Leviathan with Ranged+Shadow spells (prayer-switch by attack colour, stun and hit its back). Duke Sucellus: escape a prison cell, solve gate-code puzzles (chest passwords/combinations) while dodging Jhallan, then defeat the sleeping Duke via a mushroom-poison mechanic and dodge his ice-spike/acid/eye-gaze attacks behind pillars. The Whisperer: navigate the Shadow Realm of Lassar's undercity collecting shadow-torch schematics and keys while managing a sanity meter, then fight a magic-weak boss with frequent prayer switches. After all 4 medallions are placed, the finale ("The Desert Treasure") has you fight a Mysterious Figure, then Sliske's four wights one after another (Forsaken Assassin, Ketla the Unworthy, Kasonde the Craven, Persten the Deceitful -- each with distinct dodge mechanics) before a final cutscene with Azzanadra.

name: Devious Minds

items: A non-degraded large or colossal pouch (all 3 are consumed unless a colossal pouch is used)

notes: Heavy prerequisite chain (Wanted!, Recruitment Drive+Black Knights' Fortress+Druidic Ritual, The Lost Tribe+Goblin Diplomacy+Rune Mysteries, Priest in Peril, Enter the Abyss, Troll Stronghold+Death Plateau, Doric's Quest) plus 65 Smithing/50 Runecraft/50 Fletching. At Doric's house forge a bow-sword from a mithril 2h sword + bow string. Give it to the monk, put the orb he provides into a large pouch, then run the pouch through the Wilderness Abyss to the Law Altar and on to the Entrana church to trigger a swap cutscene. Search the resulting dead monk back at Paterdomus, return to Entrana's high priest, then finish at Falador Park with Sir Tiffy Cashien.

name: Doric's Quest

Doric wants an errand run for anvil access: buy or mine (with the bronze pickaxe he gives you) 2 iron ore + 4 copper ore + 6 clay, all un-noted, from the Dwarven Mine south of Ice Mountain just east of the start point, then hand them to Doric. One of the short prerequisite quests feeding into Devious Minds and the Falador diary.

name: Dragon Slayer I

Dragonfire protection ability (partial completion)

notes: Classic quest, gates the Rune platebody and a huge amount of mid-game content. Get Melzar's, Thalzar's, and Lozar's map pieces to Crandor in any order: Thalzar's requires using silk+lobster pot+unfired bowl+wizard's mind bomb on a magic door in the Dwarven Mine; Melzar's requires clearing his eponymous maze in Rimmington, killing a sequence of monsters (zombie rat, ghost, skeleton, zombies, Melzar the Mad, then a level-82 lesser demon) to collect keys; Lozar's is bought from or telegrabbed off Wormbrain in Port Sarim's jail. Combine the three pieces, buy/repair a boat with 3 planks+90 steel nails+2,000 coins from Klarense, sail to Crandor via Ned in Draynor Village, and kill the level-83 dragon Elvarg with an anti-dragon shield equipped (antifire potion recommended). Report back to Oziach in Edgeville to finish.

name: Dragon Slayer II

items: 12+ nails of any kind (bring extra, they can bend)
Seal of passage (or elite Fremennik Diary)
Runes for 3 Fire Wave or 3 Fire Surge casts

Myths' Guild access (pettable dog, super antifire from Primula, 4x25,000 xp lamp from Ellen, Fountain of Uhld dragonstone-jewellery recharge, Pool of Dreams re-fight/cutscene rewatch, Wrath Altar, mythical cape shop)
Adamant/rune dragons in the Lithkren Vault

notes: Grandmaster sequel to Dragon Slayer I; also requires having started the pyre-ship part of the Barbarian Training miniquest for Ancient Cavern access. Investigate a mural under Crandor, then find and solve a 24-piece jigsaw map on Fossil Island, build a rowboat to Lithkren, and read a skeleton's diary. Use a Catspeak amulet to find Bob the Cat and have the Sphinx enchant permanent cat-speech. On Lunar Isle, brew a dream potion and fight Robert the Strong inside Bob's dream (melee/crush-only fight, hide behind pillars to dodge his special). Collect 4 dragon key pieces: Karamja (navigate a trapped jungle-temple maze avoiding golem melee/ranged/magic by colour), Morytania (craft a locator orb and dowse for a buried piece in Mort Myre Swamp), Ungael (kill Vorkath, then solve a lever/timed-run dungeon puzzle), Kourend (statue-placement riddle in a skeleton-filled crypt). Reforge the key at the Ancient Cavern by casting Fire Wave/Surge on 3 dragon heads, then open the Lithkren doors. Rally Varrock/Falador/Ardougne (or Kandarin) rulers for 'A World United', then 'The Assault': defend a ship from a boarding raid, fight through checkpointed waves of increasingly dangerous dragons (green/blue, then black/steel/brutal red, then mithril/adamant/rune -- the last two have hazardous specials needing antidote++/insulated boots), and finish with a 4-phase Galvek fight requiring full dragonfire protection and phase-specific dodges (fire traps, stat-drain beam, wave-gaps, earth-bind projectiles).

name: Dream Mentor

items: 3 kinds of food totalling 20 pieces (e.g. 7+7+6, sacks/baskets of farm produce work)

unlocks: 7 new Lunar spells: Monster Examine, Humidify, Hunter Kit, Stat Spy, Dream, Plank Make, Spellbook Swap
dreamy lamp: 15,000xp in a combat skill other than Attack/Prayer
bank access on Lunar Isle without a seal of passage
The Untouchable/The Everlasting/The Inadequacy accessible in Nightmare Zone
required for Dragon Slayer II, While Guthix Sleeps, Hard Desert Diary, Hard Kourend & Kebos Diary, Elite Varrock Diary

notes: Master-difficulty Fremennik/Lunar quest, ability to defeat 4 powerful monsters without prayer required. Find Cyrisus collapsed in the Lunar Isle mine and raise his health/spirit/armament stat bars: feed him 3 food types in the same repeated order (7-7-6 split) for health, talk positively to raise spirit, and guess-and-check his ideal armour set via the bank ('Birds-Eye' Jack) confirmed with the NPC Contact spell (set varies by dominant combat style: melee/ranged/magic). Once all stats hit 100%, escort him to the Oneiromancer near the Astral Altar, brew a dream potion (goutweed + water-filled dream vial + a crushed hammered-astral-rune reagent), then enter the Dream Hall and light the brazier to fight, in sequence and without prayer, The Inadequacy (343, hardest, magic recommended), The Everlasting (223, safespottable west of the lectern), The Untouchable (274, safespottable), and The Illusive (108, burrows and relocates). The lectern at the north of the arena is the ONLY way to leave -- all teleports including ring of life are disabled, and dying here is a real hardcore-ironman-ending death. Return to the Oneiromancer afterward (keep the seal of passage) to finish.

name: Druidic Ritual

notes: Novice quest that literally unlocks the Herblore skill. Talk to Kaqemeex at the stone circle north of Taverley, then talk to Sanfew upstairs in the Taverley herb shop. Bring the four raw meats down to the Cauldron in Taverley Dungeon and use each on it to enchant them, return the enchanted meats to Sanfew, then talk to Kaqemeex to finish. Required for: A Kingdom Divided, A Taste of Hope, Barbarian Herblore, Eadgar's Ruse, Fairytale II - Cure a Queen, Grim Tales, Heroes' Quest, Jungle Potion, Recruitment Drive, Shades of Mort'ton, Song of the Elves, The Dig Site, Watchtower.

name: Dwarf Cannon

Repair 6 bent railings on the west/south fence for Lawgof with a hammer, retrieve dwarf remains from a tower, then find the goblin Lollk hiding in a crate deep in a cave south-east of the Fishing Guild. Reassemble a broken multicannon in the correct tool order (hook on spring, pliers on safety switch, tooth tool on gear), then travel to the Dwarven Black Guard camp to get Nulodion's notes and a cannonball mould before returning to Lawgof to finish.

Trollheim Teleport spell

notes: Intermediate. Sanfew sends you to Eadgar atop Trollheim for goutweed, but troll cook Burntmeat won't hand it over without a 'human' to cook. Eadgar's trick: steal and drug a parrot (vodka+pineapple chunks) from Ardougne Zoo, hide it near the troll prison rack, then supply grain/logs/tinderbox/raw chicken/pestle-and-mortar plus a dirty robe from Tegid (Taverley lake) so Eadgar builds a fake man; separately brew a troll truth potion (find a troll thistle near Eadgar's cave, dry+grind it, mix into an unf ranarr potion at Herblore 31) so Burntmeat can't lie about the recipe. Trade the fake man to Burntmeat for the storeroom key, dodge patrolling troll guards via safespots to grab one Goutweed (grab 2 extra if planning Dream Mentor/Dragon Slayer II), hand it to Sanfew. Resolves the Trollheim-teleport branch of unlock-gwd (steer item 133, boots-vs-tele choice) by granting the Trollheim Teleport spell as an alternative to the Agility 44/47 Burthorpe-route shortcuts.

name: Eagles' Peak

unlocks: ability to use box traps
access to the Eagle transport system
captured ferrets can flush white rabbits for rabbit snares
a box trap
required for At First Light, Medium Desert/Fremennik/Western Provinces Diaries, partial Medium Kourend & Kebos Diary

notes: Novice Hunter-skill quest, no series. Charlie the zookeeper needs help finding huntsman Nickolaus, missing near Eagles' Peak west of the Tree Gnome Stronghold. Find his tent, pick up a bird book that drops a metal feather, and use it to open the mountain-top door into Eagles' Peak Dungeon. Shout to Nickolaus, trapped by a giant eagle, then craft two eagle costumes (10 eagle feathers + swamp tar + yellow dye + 50 coins at Varrock's Fancy Dress Shop) so you can both disguise as eagles. To open the eagle door to Nickolaus you first need three feathers: bronze (defeat a net trap via four corner winches), silver (Hunter 27 to read a pedestal trail leading to a hidden tunnel, then kill or threaten a level 13 kebbit), and gold (solve a bird-seed/lever puzzle moving eagle statues and wing-gates through a specific lever/feeder sequence, reset lever available if you mess it up). Use all three feathers on the eagle door, wear the disguise to pass the guard eagle, then learn to catch ferrets from Nickolaus (no box trap needed for this part) and deliver a ferret to Charlie at Ardougne Zoo to finish.

name: Elemental Workshop I

items: Knife (obtainable during quest) or a slash weapon
Needle (obtainable during quest, costume needle does not work)

unlocks: Access to the Elemental Workshop location
ability to make and wield elemental shields
required for Elemental Workshop II
partial completion of an easy Kandarin Diary task

notes: First Elemental Workshop-series quest. Search a bookcase south-west of the Seers' Village bank for a battered book and read it to start. Slash it with a knife to get a battered key, then use the key on an odd-looking wall in the northern anvil-icon building to enter the underground Elemental Workshop. Turn the east then west water controls green and pull the lever to start the water wheel; fix the bellows with leather+needle (Crafting 20) and pull its lever. Mine an elemental rock (Mining 20) to spawn and kill an earth elemental (level 35) for elemental ore (kill extras now to save time for Elemental Workshop II / a Mind shield later). Fill a stone bowl with lava and use it on the furnace, then smelt the ore with 4 coal into elemental metal (Smithing 20) and smith an elemental shield at the workbench with the slashed book in inventory.

name: Elemental Workshop II

items: Pickaxe (if obtaining elemental ore during quest)
2 elemental metals (3 for a Mind shield) or 2-3 elemental ore + 8-12 coal
the battered key from Elemental Workshop I
slashed book (only if making the Mind shield)

unlocks: ability to make and use elemental mind equipment (mind helmet always; mind shield if slashed book is in inventory when smithing a second primed bar)
required for Medium Kandarin Diary

notes: Second Elemental Workshop-series quest. Find a beaten book with a scroll in the Exam Centre library south of the Digsite, read both, then head to the Elemental Workshop (same entry as EW1). Search machinery in the water elemental room for a hatch key (must have read the scroll first), and smelt 2-3 elemental ore into elemental metal bars beforehand. Downstairs, collect crane and lever schematics, craft a crane claw from one bar, connect a junction box's pipes per the lever schematic's clue, and find 3 randomly-placed cogs + a pipe piece in crates to fix a broken pipe and set cog sizes on the wind tunnel pins (small upper-left, medium lower-left, large right). Run each elemental metal bar through the crane-lava-press-water tank-fan sequence via a cart-advancing lever to produce a primed bar (do this twice for a Mind shield). One level further down, drain a bar into a primed mind bar at the extractor gun/hat (temporarily lowers Magic by 20 per bar powered). With the beaten book in inventory, smith the primed bar into a mind helmet to finish; a second powered bar plus the slashed book from Elemental Workshop I in inventory instead makes a mind shield.

name: Enakhra's Lament

items: One food item (bread/pie/cake/pizza/baked potato, not partial/burnt)
Logs, oak logs, willow logs, maple logs
Soft clay, coal, 52kg sandstone, two 5kg granite (all obtainable in-quest with Mining)
Runes for Fire Bolt/Blast/Wave, Wind Bolt/Blast/Wave, Crumble Undead
Enough Prayer for ~5 seconds of Protect from Melee

unlocks: Camulet - talk to camels + 4 free temple teleports, recharges with camel dung, or pay Lazim 1M gp for unlimited charges
Camel mask (craft with soft clay on the pedestal)

notes: Firemaking 45 is listed as a requirement but is not actually needed in practice (only used to identify brazier fuel by inspection; trial-and-error works without it). Build a statue for Lazim from 32kg sandstone base + 20kg sandstone body (chiseled down from bigger pieces), pick a head design, carve it from a 5kg granite piece, hand it over and fall into a buried temple. Bottom floor: chisel a fallen statue for 4 limbs, collect M/R/K/Z sigils by walking the outer hallway rooms (limbs auto-consumed to open each door), place all 4 sigils in the center room. Middle floor: mold soft clay + carved 5kg granite into a new stone head for the pedestal (triggers cutscene), then solve 4 corner puzzles - feed food to Pentyn (NW), cast a wind spell on the furnace (NE), light 6 braziers with correct fuel per item (SE), cast a fire spell on the fountain (SW) - to pass the magic barrier. Top floor: cast Crumble Undead on a boneguard, then Protect-from-Melee-tank while talking to a second boneguard, patch a wall with 3 sandstone pieces (chisel each into place) to finish. Region-opener quest, no known deeper dependency; unlocks quick desert-temple teleport infrastructure via Camulet.

name: Enlightened Journey

unlocks: Bomber jacket and cap (combinable with Gnome Restaurant goggles)
Access to the balloon transport system (4 new routes, +2,000 Firemaking xp per route first flight)
Ability to make origami balloons

notes: Two-trip Entrana quest that unlocks the balloon transport network -- explicitly a hard prerequisite for Monkey Madness II's Gnome Stronghold route. Trip 1: gather papyrus/candle/dye/silk/sand-filled sacks around Entrana to help Auguste build a balloon frame. Trip 2 (after leaving to gather logs/willow branches, since axes can't be brought to Entrana): attach 12 willow branches and 10 regular logs to the balloon. Piloting is a 3-screen minigame of dropping sandbags, burning logs, pulling coloured ropes, and "relaxing" a set number of times per prompt to control altitude/direction -- crashing just costs 10 more logs and a restart from Auguste. Optionally stockpile extra noted logs (oak/willow/yew/magic) in log storage to unlock further balloon routes post-quest.

name: Enter the Abyss

items: None required; recommended: Varrock/Ardougne teleport runes, a teleport to Edgeville (e.g. amulet of glory), necklace of passage for Wizards' Tower

unlocks: Ability to enter the Abyss (Runecraft essence/teleport hub)
Abyssal book
Small pouch (carries 3 pure/rune essence)

notes: Unequip any Saradomin/Guthix items before talking to the Mage of Zamorak or he refuses to speak (inventory is fine, no need to bank). Core task: he hands over a scrying orb, then you travel to the rune essence mine from 3 of 5 possible start points (Aubury/Varrock, Wizards' Tower basement, East Ardougne, Brimstail's cave, or Wizards' Guild) so the orb records readings, then return to Varrock to finish. This is the gap-filler the alch-fodder/rune-supply chain needs: it opens the Abyss as a fast essence-mining + teleport hub feeding into Enter the Abyss's own required-for list (Devious Minds, Temple of the Eye, partial Wanted!, Wilderness Easy Diary).

name: Ernest the Chicken

unlocks: 300 coins
Access to the Killerwatt Plane (members)

notes: Requires only the ability to survive a level 22 skeleton. Explore the spooky Draynor Manor for Veronica's missing fiance Ernest: gather poison and fish food to make poisoned fish food, solve a lever/door puzzle in the basement to fetch an oil can, dig up a key from the compost heap outside, retrieve a pressure gauge from a poisoned fountain, and grab a rubber tube from a skeleton-guarded room, then deliver all the parts to Professor Oddenstein to turn Ernest back from a chicken.

name: Ethically Acquired Antiquities

unlocks: 5,000 coins

notes: Investigate a theft from the Fortis Grand Museum. Inspect the empty display case, talk to Curator Herminius, then question museum visitors until one mentions a suspicious man. Follow the trail: Regulus Cento by the quetzals, then a Trader Crewmember (do Artima a sail-repair favour first to get his help), then Trader Stan/crew at Port Sarim, then Betty at the Port Sarim rune shop for a note. Head to Varrock Museum, ask Curator Haig Halen about Xerna's Diadem, pickpocket him for the storeroom key, search the crates in the NE storeroom, then confront and shame Haig Halen with the correct dialogue picks (the in-depth guide lists the exact options). Return to Herminius at the Fortis museum to close the case.

name: Fairytale I - Growing Pains

items: secateurs (buyable at Sarah's Farming shop near quest start, 5gp)

unlocks: Magic secateurs (boosts some crop harvests)
Tanglefoot fightable in Nightmare Zone

notes: Must be able to defeat a level 111 Tanglefoot with limited weaponry (may be flinched). Nature Spirit's own Priest in Peril/Restless Ghost requirements are inherited/flattened. Talk to Martin the Master Gardener (do not pickpocket him or you're locked out for 10 game-minutes), then speak to 5 of the Group of Advanced Gardeners at farming patches (any except Ayesha in Al Kharid or the Kourend ones) confirming membership, then report back to Martin. Travel to Zanaris (dramen/lunar staff), talk to the Fairy Godfather, then Fairy Nuff for a symptoms list, then Zandar Horfyre atop the Dark Wizards' Tower. Give Malignius Mortifer (NW of Port Sarim rune shop) a Draynor skull (dug from a grave at Draynor Manor) to get a list of 3 randomly-assigned items to collect (bring a filled druid pouch to protect perishables from ghasts), then take them plus a ghostspeak amulet to the Nature Spirit in the Nature Grotto (Mort Myre Swamp) for Magic secateurs. Return to Zanaris, squeeze through a gap near the Cosmic Altar, fight and kill the level 111 Tanglefoot (Protect from Melee or flinch around mushrooms) with Magic secateurs equipped, take the Queen's secateurs, and talk to the Fairy Godfather to finish.

name: Fairytale II - Cure a Queen

skills: Thieving 40 (boostable: no, needed to pickpocket the Fairy Godfather, not needed just to unlock fairy rings)

unlocks: Antique lamp: 2,500xp in any skill over level 30
Access to the fairy ring network (usable partway through the quest, before full completion)
Access to Fairy Fixit's Fairy Enchantment shop
required for Hopespear's Will miniquest
6 Medium diary tasks needing fairy ring travel (Kandarin ALS; Ardougne AIR/BIS; Fremennik CIP; Lumbridge & Draynor DIS; Kourend & Kebos CIR)

notes: Second Fairy Tale-series quest. Wait for Martin's crops to fail again (~5.5 min logged-in time), then investigate in Zanaris: find Fairy Nuff's ransacked grotto and pick up Nuff's certificate, decipher its fairy-symbol code by reading the Cosmic Altar's rune temple sign in Zanaris. Get permission from the Fairy Godfather to use fairy rings and learn the network from the Co-ordinator/Fairy Fixit. Use a 4-code fairy ring sequence (AIR, DLR, DJQ, AJS) with Nuff's certificate in inventory to reach the Fairy Queen's hideout, where Fairy Nuff explains the dying queen needs her stolen magic secateurs back. Pickpocket the Fairy Godfather (Thieving 40, no boost) for the Queen's secateurs, deliver them to Fairy Nuff, then brew a magic essence potion from a star flower (grown on the CKP cosmic plane, Farming 49) and gorak claw powder (killed from level 145 Goraks on the DIR gorak plane, Herblore 57 to combine). Use the potion on the Fairy Queen to revive her; she ultimately decides to let the Godfather keep the throne for now given his numerical advantage.

name: Family Crest

items: Shrimps, salmon, tuna, bass, swordfish (all cooked)

unlocks: Steel gauntlets, choose one of: Cooking gauntlets (Caleb, reduces burning of lobster/swordfish/monkfish/shark/anglerfish/kyatt), Goldsmith gauntlets (Avan, +150% Smithing xp from smelting gold), Chaos gauntlets (Johnathon, +3 damage to chaos-rune bolt spells)
After the Family Pest miniquest: buy unlimited copies of all 3 gauntlets for a one-off 500,000gp
Chronozon fightable in the Nightmare Zone

notes: Experienced quest requiring defeat of level 170 Chronozon (safespottable, fought in the Wilderness). Talk to Dimintheis about his family's lost crest, then track down his 3 sons: Caleb in Catherby (feed him 5 cooked fish types for the cooking gauntlets); Avan at the scorpion mining pit near Al Kharid's Gem Trader (mine 2 'perfect' gold ore from the hellhound room in Witchaven Dungeon via a lever-sequence puzzle, smelt and craft a ruby ring and necklace, hand them over for the goldsmith gauntlets); Johnathon at the Jolly Boar Inn near Varrock (give him a poison cure) for the last crest piece's location, then fight Chronozon (Edgeville Dungeon's Wilderness section) by landing all 4 elemental Blast spells on him before finishing him off any way. Assemble the crest and return it to Dimintheis to finish. Required for: Family Pest, Defender of Varrock, Legends' Quest, Recipe for Disaster (Freeing Sir Amik Varze), Elite Kandarin Diary.

name: Family Pest

unlocks: Ability to own the steel gauntlets AND all three of its upgraded forms (chaos gauntlets, cooking gauntlets, goldsmith gauntlets) simultaneously in unlimited amounts -- get replacements free from Dimintheis or any of his sons at any time

notes: Pure dialogue miniquest, no combat/skilling: visit Dimintheis's three sons in any order (Avan at Al Kharid mine, Caleb in Catherby, Johnathon at the Jolly Boar Inn) who each turn down help with a comic non-problem, then return to Dimintheis, who reveals the family isn't actually rich and asks for 500,000gp instead. Hand over the coins to finish. The real payoff is the gauntlet-duplication unlock, since normally only one gauntlet type can be held/enchanted at a time.

name: Fight Arena

unlocks: 1,000 coins
Khazard armour set
Bouncer accessible in Nightmare Zone
required for The General's Shadow and While Guthix Sleeps

notes: Third quest in the Mahjarrat series. Lady Servil's family has been kidnapped by General Khazard to fight in his arena. Get Khazard armour from a chest in a house south of Ardougne Monastery and wear it to be let into the prison. Free Sammy Servil after buying Khali brew (5 coins) from the Khazard barman to get the Head Guard drunk and steal his cell keys. Fight through a scripted sequence in the arena: level 63 Khazard ogre, level 44 Khazard scorpion, level 137 Bouncer (hellhound) -- all safespottable behind a skeleton, or use Protect from Melee. The optional level 142 General Khazard fight can be skipped via the door's quick-escape. Return to Lady Servil to finish.

name: Fishing Contest

items: 5 coins (10 if buying a rod from Jack)
Fishing rod or pearl fishing rod (oily fishing rod does not work)

unlocks: Access to the underground White Wolf Mountain passage
Ability to catch minnows in the Fishing Guild (needs 82 Fishing + full Angler's outfit)

notes: Novice quest gating a shortcut through White Wolf Mountain. Talk to either dwarf guarding the mountain's tunnel entrances (starting on the west side is faster on foot). Grab garlic from a house south-west of the Seers' Village bank if needed, take a spade to McGrubor's Wood and dig up 3 red vine worms from the vine just west of fairy ring ALS. Head to Hemenster, buy a fishing rod from Grandpa Jack if you don't have one, enter with the fishing pass, put garlic in the north pipes (finish the dialogue), pay Bonzo 5 coins and start fishing once the Sinister Stranger clears the pipes. After winning the contest, bring the trophy back to the dwarf to finish. Required for: Recipe for Disaster (Freeing the Mountain Dwarf), Forgettable Tale..., Between a Rock..., Land of the Goblins.

name: Forgettable Tale...

items: 1 random item from an NPC-specified list

unlocks: 2 Dwarven stout (m)

notes: Part 2 of the Rise of the Red Axe series (after The Giant Dwarf). Investigate the Red Axe via an extremely drunk, kebab-obsessed dwarf: ply him with beer, fetch a random item requested by a rowdy dwarf, deliver a dwarven stout to Khorvak, then grow kelda seeds in the Kelda Hops Patch (15-20 min real-time wait) and brew them into kelda ale at the East Keldagrim pub vat (another 15-20 min wait) -- plan filler activities like High Alch around the waits. Explore a closed-off minecart tunnel through 6 rooms, including 3 sliding-block cart-track puzzles and a room requiring you to read 3 Red Axe documents. Finish by drinking a beer and eating a kebab back at the eastern pub after reporting to Veldaban.

name: Garden of Tranquillity

items: full leprechaun tool set (rake, seed dibber, spade, secateurs, watering can, gardening trowel)
rune dust (hammer/chisel rune essence or pestle+mortar rune shards)

unlocks: activated ring of charos (a) - cheaper services/extra dialogue from various NPCs
apple tree seed
acorn
5 guam seeds
4-dose compost potion
white tree in personal garden yields fruit that restores ~8% energy, regrows over time

notes: Long quest, mostly farming-timer-gated. Talk to Ellamaria then the Wise Old Man in Draynor (wearing ring of charos) to pass a quiz. Grow seeds for 5 NPCs to trade up to rarer seeds: Lyra (west of Port Phasmatys, fairy ring AJQ) grows onions for orchid seeds; Kragen (north Ardougne, fairy ring BJR) grows cabbages for snowdrop seeds; Elstan (south Falador) grows marigolds for delphinium seeds; Dantaera (Catherby) needs a cutting from the White Tree on Ice Mountain grown in a filled plant pot; Brother Althric (Edgeville monastery) needs the ring of charos(a) thrown down the well then retrieved with a fishing rod, plus rune dust used on a plant cure for diseased vines, for rose seeds; Bernald (behind Burthorpe pub) similarly needs a plant-cure/rune-dust vine cure via Alain at the Taverley tree patch, for vine seeds. Then move two statues via trolley (Lumbridge king statue east across the bridge to the garden's east plinth; Falador Saradomin statue north through the gate, cutscene, to the south plinth). Finally plant everything with compost/supercompost in the garden (10-15 min grow, cannot die), talk to Ellamaria, then King Roald (ring of charos(a) must be equipped or he won't follow) for the finishing cutscene.

name: Gertrude's Cat

items: Seasoned sardine (or raw sardine + doogle leaves obtained in-quest)

unlocks: Own kitten
Chocolate cake (keep for A Tail of Two Cats)
Stew (keep for The Queen of Thieves)
Gertrude sells further kittens for 100gp each

notes: No requirements. Talk to Gertrude, feed a seasoned sardine and milk to her lost cat found up a ladder at the Lumber Yard NE of Varrock (chopping the dying tree there also ticks an easy Varrock diary task), then search crates below for Fluffs' kitten and reunite them before returning to Gertrude for a starter kitten. Feeds into Ratcatchers and other cat-line quests.

name: Getting Ahead

unlocks: 3,000 coins
Tannery access in Kebos Lowlands (via Mary)
Headless Beast accessible in Nightmare Zone

notes: Kourend/Kebos Lowlands quest. Speak to Gordon and Mary about their missing livestock, use a pot of flour on the southern gate to lay a scent trail south past the bridge and west into the Kebos Lowlands mine cave, kill the level-82 Headless Beast there. Craft a fake head to fool them: soft clay knifed into a clay head, fur+needle/thread into a fur head, red dye for a bloody head, then mount it on the wall with two planks and six nails. Report back to Gordon to finish.

name: Ghosts Ahoy

items: ~31 ecto-tokens (or bone/pot/bucket to earn them at the Ectofuntus)
nettle tea ingredients (tinderbox, log, closed-finger gloves, bowl of water)

unlocks: free passage into Port Phasmatys
Ectophial (direct teleport to Ectofuntus, refills there)
required for Dragon Slayer II + Morytania medium diary

notes: Earn ecto-tokens at the Ectofuntus, then chase down items for a runaway ghost bride's quest: brew nettle tea for an old crone, repair a toy ship and dye its flag to solve a mast puzzle for a hidden treasure map, dig up the Book of Haricanto after fighting a level-32 giant lobster, win a coin-flip game (Rune-Draw) for a translation manual, and collect 10 ghost signatures on a petition before performing a passing-on ceremony for Necrovarus.

name: Goblin Diplomacy

unlocks: a gold bar

notes: No skill/quest requirements, no combat. Goblins are debating a new armour colour. Collect 3 sets of goblin mail from crates around Goblin Village (or off goblin drops), make blue dye (woad leaves from Wyson the gardener + Aggie in Draynor) and orange dye (combine red+yellow dye from Aggie), dye one mail orange and one blue, leave the third plain. Show the generals orange (rejected), then blue (rejected) -- they settle on the original plain brown. This is the real gate on the RFD 'Freeing the Goblin generals' subquest.

name: Grim Tales

items: 2 tarromin potion (unf) or 2 vials of water + 2 tarromins
Seed dibber (skippable with Barbarian Training farming)
Leather gloves (obtainable during quest, optional -- 17 damage if skipped)
high-healing food, good armour/weapon (ability to defeat level 138 Glod)

rewards.xp: 60,000 Woodcutting, 25,000 Agility, 25,000 Thieving, 15,000 Herblore, 10,000 Farming, 5,000 Hitpoints; 1 QP
unlocks: Dwarven helmet (equip in Dwarven Mines for a Hard Falador Diary task)
Glod accessible in Nightmare Zone
required for Hard tier of the Falador Diary

notes: Master quest, no series, heavy fairy-tale references. Collector Sylas wants two rare items for his magic beans: a feather from the griffin Grimgnash on White Wolf Mountain (tell him an escalating violent bedtime story via specific dialogue options or take 20% current HP damage) and a helmet from dwarf Rupert, imprisoned in a tower between Goblin Village and Ice Mountain. Climb the tower's crumbling east wall (Thieving 58) to reach Rupert, then climb his lowered beard (Agility 59) to talk to him; Princess Miazrqa will free him only if you retrieve her pendant, stolen by a mouse and hidden in the Witch's House basement behind an electric-shocking gate (leather gloves avoid 17 damage) and a piano puzzle (play notes EFEDCAEGA). Shrink with a herblore-brewed potion (Herblore 52) to enter the mouse hole, navigate nail-wall ladders past level 95 mice to the pendant, then trade it to Miazrqa for Rupert's helmet. Give both items to Sylas for magic beans, plant them near Taverley's tree patch, then climb the fast-growing beanstalk (Agility 59, no followers allowed) to fight Glod, a level 118-to-138 cloud giant weak to Magic who quakes to drain Prayer and heals himself. Loot includes a golden goblin and gems; use the spare shrinking potion on the beanstalk then chop it down (Woodcutting 71) and return to Sylas for the reward.

name: Haunted Mine

unlocks: ability to make the Salve amulet (undead combat bonus)
shortcut to the crystal outcrops
access to Tarn's Lair
Treus Dayth accessible in Nightmare Zone
required for Lair of Tarn Razorlor + Morytania medium/hard diary + Ardougne elite diary

notes: Pickpocket the Zealot's key, descend through the Abandoned Mine's cave levels, solve a lever/points puzzle to route a minecart carrying a light-giving glowing fungus, retrieve the fungus, open a water valve to access a lift, then fight Treus Dayth (level 95 but notably harder than the level suggests -- ranged/magic + Protect from Missiles recommended, not a safe death fight since the fungus is lost on death) before cutting a crystal outcrop to finish.

name: Hazeel Cult

items: None to start; a weapon/armour/food recommended if siding with Ceril (must kill level 13 Alomone)

unlocks: 2,000 coins (plus 5 extra if siding with Ceril)
Carnillean armour if siding with Ceril (lower defence than iron platebody)
Hazeel's mark cosmetic if siding with Hazeel
5 Kudos claimable from Historian Minas
required for Secrets of the North

notes: Second Mahjarrat-series quest, novice, with a good/evil branch (same structure as Temple of Ikov). Ceril Carnillean says cultists stole his family armour; head to the cave south-east of the Ardougne clock tower and talk to Clivet to learn about the Mahjarrat Hazeel. Choose a side: siding with Ceril means refusing Clivet, turning 5 sewer valves in specific directions to reach the hideout raft, killing Alomone (level 13) for Carnillean armour, then reporting to Ceril for a fake ending -- search the upstairs cupboard for Hazeel's mark and poison and show Ceril to fire the butler for the real reward. Siding with Hazeel means accepting Clivet's offer, poisoning Ceril's cooking range (accidentally kills the dog Scruffy instead), getting Hazeel's mark from Clivet, turning the same 5 valves, then helping Butler Jones steal a restoration scroll from a locked chest in Ceril's house and giving it to Alomone to begin the resurrection. Choice also has a minor effect on Secrets of the North.

name: Heroes' Quest

items: A second player "partner" from the opposite Shield of Arrav gang (Black Arm/Phoenix)
Ice gloves (obtainable in-quest) or smith's gloves(i)
Black full armour if Black Arm Gang member (non-trimmed)

unlocks: Heroes' Guild access
Dragon battleaxe + dragon mace purchase/wield
Fountain of Heroes (recharge amulet of glory)
Charge dragonstone jewellery scrolls
Fountain of Rune amulet-of-glory recharge grants 6 charges instead of 4

notes: Requires a second player as a partner from the OPPOSITE Shield of Arrav gang (Black Arm vs Phoenix) for a cooperative candlestick-theft sequence in Brimhaven - cannot be soloed. 3 independent fetch chains converge at Achietties: (1) Lava eel - get blamish snail slime from Gerrant in Port Sarim, mix into harralander(unf) for blamish oil, oil your fishing rod, travel to Taverley Dungeon (get dusty key from Velrak after killing the Jailer, or use 70 Agility shortcut, or 60 Sailing route via Charred Dungeon) and fish+cook one lava eel near the blue dragons. (2) Master thieves' armband - Black Arm partner talks Trobert in Brimhaven (password "Four leaved clover"), gets Miscellaneous key from Grip, passes it to Phoenix partner who navigates Brimhaven's food shop/secret wall panel (password "Gherkin" with Straven in Varrock) to lock Grip in a room; Black Arm partner then kills/traps Grip, loots 2 candlesticks from a chest, trades 1 to the Phoenix partner - each turns in a candlestick to their own gang leader (Katrine/Straven) for the armband. (3) Fire feather - get Ice Gloves by killing the level-111 Ice Queen inside White Wolf Mountain (ladder/tunnel maze north side), then travel to Entrana and kill the Firebird near the Law Altar for its feather. Hand in all three (eel, armband, feather) to Achietties. High spine value: hard-gates Legends' Quest and unlocks dragon weapon purchase infrastructure.

name: His Faithful Servants

items: Combat equipment to defeat the Barrows Brothers

unlocks: Crypt map — permanently reveals the Barrows crypt minimap once studied, then is destroyed

notes: Short experienced-tier miniquest. The Strange Old Man asks you to retrieve a strange icon guarded by the six Barrows Brothers — defeat all six, then loot the icon from the Barrows reward chest (keep at least 6 free inventory slots or you must redo all six brothers to get it), and return it to him to finish. Wiki lists 'Required for completing: Desert Treasure II - The Fallen Empire' (Twisted Tale/lore cross-reference, not a normal prerequisite chain). Promoted into this batch from a stalled wave3:morytania-prayer-pvm queue entry per DEPTH_BACKLOG Band C guidance.

name: Holy Grail

skills: Attack 20 (boostable: no; not a hard quest requirement, needed to wield Excalibur)

unlocks: Access to the Fisher Realm
King Arthur picture unlocked for Construction wall decoration
Black Knight Titan accessible in Nightmare Zone
required for King's Ransom

notes: Second Camelot-series quest. King Arthur sends the player after the Holy grail; Merlin points to Entrana and Sir Galahad. Visit Entrana (weapons/armour must be deposited for the monks) and meet a mysterious crone who explains a Fisher King needs help. Get a holy table napkin from Galahad west of McGrubor's Woods, then grab two magic whistles from a room in Draynor Manor. Travel to Brimhaven, head to the guard tower north of the goldmine, and blow a whistle to enter the Fisher King's Realm. Kill the Black Knight Titan (level 120, +1000 magic/ranged defence, flinchable) but the killing blow must be dealt with Excalibur or he heals to full. Ring the grail bell to meet the ailing Fisher King, who asks you to find his son Percival. Get a magic gold feather from King Arthur, follow it to Goblin Village, and find Percival hiding in sacks in the east house; give him a magic whistle. Return to the Fisher Realm (fairy ring code BJR works now) where Percival has become king, then take the Holy grail from upstairs and return it to King Arthur.

Flashback 2: re-enter pyramid, take the correct canopic jar from the west room, kill the guardian that spawns, take the jar out (crossing the pit twice), then return and drop the jar back before leaving. Prep for the ceremony: give the Embalmer linen+salt+sap, give the Carpenter willow logs for a holy symbol. Flashback 3: use the holy symbol on a sarcophagus in the east room, kill the level-91 Possessed Priest, talk High Priest. Flashback 4: talk High Priest again in the temple to finish. Post-quest: equipping the catspeak amulet and asking your cat about "being confused" unlocks bonus lore cutscenes. High spine value: opens Sophanem/Menaphos region access.

Flow: at Sinclair Mansion, break in via smashed east window, grab scrap paper + address form + black knight helm from bookcase, give all 3 to guard then talk Gossip. Travel to Seers' Village courthouse for Anna's Trial: call Dog Handler (ask about poison), Butler (ask about dagger), Maid (ask about night of murder + thread) as witnesses via the Judge to get her declared not guilty. At Camelot Castle statue: cutscene, then free Merlin from his cell (reach vent, Telekinetic Grab a guard's hair clip or take a knight's lockpick, solve a 4-tumbler lock puzn - raise each tumbler until it shows green, keep raising the rest), climb to top floor and pick the round purple box. At Black Knights' Fortress (west of Edgeville): get an Animate rock scroll from Wizard Cromperty in Ardougne first, wear full black armour to enter through the south sturdy door, push the north wall, climb down, free King Arthur from his statue using granite, give him the bronze med helm + iron chainbody, then report to King Arthur at Camelot's round table to finish. notes: Not a Quest-List miniquest -- it's a members-only Activity/training-ground gated by a quest (King's Ransom), listed on the Miniquests page's 'one-off content without miniquest designation' table (Length=Long there) rather than under 'List of miniquests'. Fight 8 increasingly tough knights (level 110-127) in sequence, Melee-only (no Prayer/Ranged/Magic allowed in the room), each draining a specific combat stat on hit; progress is saved on death/teleport (resume at the knight that killed you) but resets to wave 1 only if you leave via the door. A flinch-behind-the-training-dummy strategy is the commonly cited safe/cheap method; Guthan's set or straightforward gear-and-food both also work at 65+ combat stats. Confirmed safe death for solo Hardcore Ironman (not safe for Hardcore Group Ironman).

Fastest entry is a Slayer ring teleport straight to Tarn's Lair (skips the whole trap gauntlet); otherwise walk in via the Haunted Mine cave and navigate floor/wall/log traps and receding-wall pits (search to disarm; log traps re-arm if you fall) to reach a banker (100gp/use, last restock point) then on to Tarn's chamber. Fight: Tarn transforms into a level-69 mutant with two level-110 terror dogs and nearby level-53 animated armour; Protect from Melee, ignore the dogs/armour (only Tarn needs to die), watch for continuous prayer drain. After the mutant form dies he becomes an easier level-69 ghost (poison carries over between forms). Read Tarn's diary in the next room to finish; enchant salve amulets with it afterward at leisure.

Unlock the crypt with all 6 keys and defeat 4 named goblin-ancestor bosses (Snothead, Snailfeet, Mosschin, Redeyes) then the level-184 Strongbones (skoblins present, Protect from Magic) to learn Yu'biusk's location. notes: Master-difficulty capstone quest, one of the deepest prereq chains in the game (Family Crest, Heroes' Quest incl. Shield of Arrav/Lost City/Merlin's Crystal/Dragon Slayer I, Shilo Village line, Underground Pass line, Waterfall Quest, 107 QP). Must be able to beat a level-187 demon (Nezikchened, fought up to 3x). Flow: talk Radimus Erkle at the guild, travel to Kharazi Jungle south of Shilo Village, chop through and map all 3 jungle sections with Radimus notes, get bullroarer from a Jungle forester, summon Gujuo, crawl into Mossy rock cave (50 Agility). Smith a golden bowl (2 gold bars + hammer), have Gujuo enchant it (42+ Prayer, can fail), fill with sacred water from the pool, squeeze through a bookcase crevice, lockpick a gate, smash 3 boulders, force a 2nd gate (50 Str), place gems on carved rocks by color to open a marked wall (Soul/Mind/Earth/Law/Law rune order) and get the binding book. Douse Ungadulu's fire with the bowl, bind him with the book, fight and kill Nezikchened (prayer drained to 1/10 at fight start; ranged/melee+protect-melee recommended, he has high magic resist). Get Yommi tree seeds from Ungadulu, water them, brew a bravery potion (ardrigal + snake weed + vial water) for a branching "evil" (short, kill Viyeldi for a glowing dagger) or "good" (long, cast Holy Force on Zekin) path through a second cave to restore the water source, fighting 3 named skeletons (lvl 106/100/92) for crystal pieces either way. Grow+carve a Yommi totem from the restored tree, use on an old totem pole, survive 4 unavoidable melee hits (up to 72 dmg total, pray Protect Melee) while Nezikchened respawns after each of 3 skeletons, get gilded totem from Gujuo. Hand gilded totem + notes to Radimus at the guild, pick 4 skills for the 30k xp reward, finish. Very high spine value as a QP/skill-chain gate for later quests + the quest-cape line.
